# /design-system

Use `@/.github/agents/architect.agent.md`.

Create or update the technical design for selected backlog scope. The design must:
- reference `@/.github/TECH.md`
- right-size architecture to complexity (simple to Onion/Hexagonal/Modular Monolith as needed)
- define module boundaries, ports/adapters, contracts, and NFR controls
- be implementation-ready for task planning
